name: Supabase MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop alt-tabbing to the Supabase dashboard. Your agent manages your entire database layer — migrations, queries, RLS policies, and auth.

name: GitHub MCP Server
sellTemplate: Never leave your editor to manage PRs, issues, or check CI status. Your agent handles the entire GitHub workflow — creating branches, reviewing PRs, and managing releases.

name: Linear MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop context-switching to Linear to update tickets. Your agent creates issues, updates status, adds comments, and manages sprints — all from your editor.

name: PostgreSQL MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop copying SQL queries between your editor and psql. Your agent reads your schema, writes queries, and manages migrations directly.

name: Docker MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop memorizing docker compose flags and debugging container networking. Your agent manages containers, builds images, and reads logs for you.

name: Playwright MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop manually clicking through your app to verify changes. Your agent navigates, clicks, fills forms, and takes screenshots — turning manual QA into automated verification.

name: Filesystem MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop running find/cp/mv commands manually. Your agent handles bulk file operations, directory restructuring, and file organization with full path awareness.

name: App Store Connect CLI
sellTemplate: Never open Xcode or App Store Connect again. Your agent handles TestFlight builds, release submissions, entitlements, and provisioning profiles — the entire iOS deployment pipeline that currently eats 30+ minutes of your day.

name: iOS Simulator MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop manually launching the simulator, tapping through flows, and screenshotting. Your agent boots sims, navigates your app, and verifies UI — your personal QA tester.

name: Vercel MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop switching to the Vercel dashboard for deployment status, environment variables, and domain config. Your agent deploys, rolls back, and manages your entire hosting setup.

name: AWS MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop memorizing AWS CLI flags and navigating the AWS Console maze. Your agent manages S3 buckets, Lambda functions, and IAM policies with full context of your infrastructure.

name: Sentry MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop opening Sentry dashboards to triage errors. Your agent reads crash reports, identifies patterns, and can even start fixing the bugs that caused them.

name: Slack MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop context-switching to Slack for status updates and team coordination. Your agent reads channels, sends messages, and keeps your team in the loop without you leaving your flow.

name: Todoist MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop opening Todoist to track tasks your agent already knows about. It creates, completes, and organizes your todos based on what you're actually working on.

name: Portless
sellTemplate: Stop chasing localhost:3000, 5173, and 8080 across parallel sessions. Portless gives each app a stable named local URL so you and your agent stop wasting time on port collisions, stale tabs, and dev-server cleanup.

name: Turborepo
sellTemplate: Stop waiting for full rebuilds when only one package changed. Turborepo caches everything and only rebuilds what's needed — your agent runs faster, your CI bills shrink.

name: Biome
sellTemplate: Stop configuring ESLint + Prettier separately and fighting config conflicts. Biome does formatting and linting in one tool, 35x faster.

name: GitHub CLI (gh)
sellTemplate: Stop opening GitHub in the browser for PRs and issues. gh CLI lets your agent create PRs, check CI, review code, and manage releases — all from the terminal.

name: Railway CLI
sellTemplate: Stop context-switching to Railway's dashboard. Your agent deploys services, checks logs, and manages environment variables — push to deploy from your editor.

name: Kubernetes MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop wrestling with kubectl and YAML manifests. Your agent manages pods, deployments, and services — debugs crashloops, scales replicas, and reads logs.

name: Puppeteer MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop manually testing web UIs and capturing screenshots. Your agent automates browser interactions, fills forms, and verifies rendered output.

name: Cloudflare MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop navigating the Cloudflare dashboard for Workers, DNS, and cache settings. Your agent manages your edge infrastructure directly.

name: Stripe MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop curling the Stripe API and navigating the dashboard for payment debugging. Your agent reads charges, manages subscriptions, and investigates failed payments.

name: SQLite MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop opening DB Browser for SQLite or running sqlite3 commands. Your agent queries, inspects, and manages your local databases inline.

name: Context7
sellTemplate: Stop letting your agent hallucinate outdated APIs. Context7 feeds live, version-specific library docs directly into your session — no more 'that method was deprecated 6 months ago' surprises.

name: XcodeBuild MCP
sellTemplate: Stop pasting Xcode build errors into chat. Your agent triggers builds, reads compiler errors, and runs tests directly — closing the iOS build-fix loop without you touching Xcode.

name: Claude Squad
sellTemplate: Stop manually juggling tmux panes for parallel agent work. Claude Squad manages multiple agents in isolated workspaces — you see all their progress in one terminal.

name: Claude Flow (ruflo)
sellTemplate: Stop being the orchestrator between agents that write, test, and review. Claude Flow deploys multi-agent swarms that coordinate autonomously — you set the goal, they figure out who does what.

name: ccusage
sellTemplate: Stop guessing how much your agent sessions cost. ccusage parses your local logs and shows token usage, cost breakdown, and trends — so you know which workflows are burning tokens.

name: gstack
sellTemplate: Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup — 6 opinionated skills that act as CEO, eng manager, release manager, and QA. Skip months of prompt engineering and start with a battle-tested workflow.

name: Claude Context MCP
sellTemplate: Stop waiting for your agent to grep through a million lines. Claude Context indexes your entire codebase for semantic search — your agent finds the right code instantly, not approximately.

name: React Doctor
sellTemplate: Stop shipping React anti-patterns your agent introduced. React Doctor scans for performance issues, security holes, and bad practices — your agent's code reviewer for React.

name: Anthropic Knowledge Work Plugins
sellTemplate: Official Anthropic plugins that connect Claude to enterprise tools — Jira, Confluence, Google Workspace. Your agent reads specs, updates tickets, and drafts docs without you being the copy-paste relay.

name: Shotgun
sellTemplate: Stop reviewing 800-line PRs your agent dumped on you. Shotgun splits features into staged, codebase-aware specs so agents produce reviewable, incremental PRs — not monster diffs.

name: Claude Code MCP (nested agents)
sellTemplate: Agent-in-agent delegation. Your main Claude session spawns one-shot sub-agents for isolated tasks — research, file generation, refactoring — without polluting your primary context.

name: Figma MCP Server
sellTemplate: Stop manually translating Figma designs into code. Your agent reads the actual design file — colors, spacing, components — and generates matching UI. The design-to-code gap disappears.

name: MCP SuperAssistant
sellTemplate: Brings MCP to ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Perplexity, and more. Use your MCP servers across any AI chat interface — not just Claude.
